confext: Configuration Extraction version 1.0.0-preview.2+eb8892cfd2ff5e68616d207564b1ecce4913e6fe (eb8892c) Usage: confext [options] Options: -p, --pattern

(REQUIRED) Patterns for settings to extract -i, --input File to read or ignore to read from stdin [default: ] -o, --output File to write or ignore to write to stdout [default: ] -s, --settings Configuration values pre-pended to output [default: System.String[]] --prefix Value to prefix configuration keys read [default: ] --version Show version information -?, -h, --help Show help and usage information
